name: Bridal
subtitle: Jewellery for the bride of your dreams
description: The wedding day deserves nothing less than perfection. Our bridal collection brings together the finest Polki, Kundan, and antique gold jewellery — crafted to make you feel like royalty on the most important day of your life.
styling_tips: Layer your necklace with a choker for a full bridal look. Pair a grand matha pati with minimal earrings if your necklace is heavy. Complete with a matching hath panja.
meta_description: Shop bridal jewellery at Ria Art Jewellery Mumbai. Complete bridal sets, chokers, matha pati, hath panja and more.
